title: Call to Battle - Revolutionary War Addon
description: Call to Battle Revolution brings the Revolutionary War to Minecraft! Experience Muskets, Flintlock Pistols, and more.  Fight for freedom in 1776!
body:
![Call to Battle WW2 Experience](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7574e3821ff263123d2332039a6abcd485bc0e9f.png)

Ready to fight for freedom? This addon for Call to Battle adds weapons and armor from the Revolutionary War of 1776. Experience black powder muskets and flintlock pistols!

**Don't have Call to Battle? It's a massive World War II conversion mod! Get it here:**
[https://modrinth.com/mod/call-to-battle-ww2](https://modrinth.com/mod/call-to-battle-ww2)

![Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/567b4066ce706dc81c95a21a12fa402b02b88a7a.png)

Call to Battle - Revolution adds weapons and armor from the Revolutionary War.

Currently there is British uniforms, weapons, and a bonus uniform made by AngryLoyer! :)

Requires base Call to Battle here:
[https://modrinth.com/mod/call-to-battle-ww2](https://modrinth.com/mod/call-to-battle-ww2)

![Social Media](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/007c45f590bd22b6563afe69d574f5a5e290611e.png)
